vocab.meaning: phù hợp với những giá trị cốt lõi của bản thân
vocab.example: I chose Social Work because it deeply aligns with my core values of empathy and social justice.
It has always been a burning ambition of mine to contribute to the field of aerospace engineering.

vocab.meaning: năng khiếu bẩm sinh về cái gì
vocab.example: My teachers noticed I had an innate aptitude for mathematics, so pursuing Data Science felt like the right path.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng bộ kỹ năng của mình
vocab.example: I opted for a degree in Liberal Arts to broaden my skill set across various humanities subjects.
Software development skills are currently highly sought-after, which heavily influenced my choice of major.

vocab.meaning: một môi trường kích thích trí tuệ
vocab.example: I was looking for an intellectually stimulating environment where I could debate complex political theories.

vocab.meaning: kinh nghiệm thực hành thực tế
vocab.example: This major appealed to me because it prioritizes practical hands-on experience over rote memorization.
Studying Economics will pave the way for a career in global policy-making or financial consultancy.

vocab.meaning: những khía cạnh phức tạp/chi tiết tinh vi của
vocab.example: I've always wanted to understand the intricacies of human behavior, hence my fascination with Psychology.

vocab.meaning: một ý nghĩa/mục đích sống sâu sắc
vocab.example: Majoring in Medicine gives me a profound sense of purpose, knowing I can help people in their most vulnerable moments.
